---
title: "Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-26"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
libraries <- c(
  "tidyverse"
)

#load and install packages
for(lib in libraries) {
  if (!require(lib, character.only = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(lib, dependencies = TRUE)
    library(lib, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}
#load auxiliary functions
source("~/Hubic/Analise_de_dados/KisangaQ/functions/climate_io.R")
```


```{r}
temp <- get_data("Temperature")
rainfall <- get_data("Rainfall")
ndvi <- get_data("NDVI")
burn <- get_data("Burning")
```

```{r}
#generate a sample dataframe with 10 rows to be used in the app
temp <- temp %>%
  sample_n(10)

rainfall <- rainfall %>%
  sample_n(10)

ndvi <- ndvi %>%
  sample_n(10)

burn <- burn %>%
  sample_n(10)

#export sample dataframes to csv
write_csv(temp, "~/Hubic/Analise_de_dados/KisangaQ_web/data/samples/temp_sample.csv")
write_csv(rainfall, "~/Hubic/Analise_de_dados/KisangaQ_web/data/samples/rainfall_sample.csv")
write_csv(ndvi, "~/Hubic/Analise_de_dados/KisangaQ_web/data/samples/ndvi_sample.csv")
write_csv(burn, "~/Hubic/Analise_de_dados/KisangaQ_web/data/samples/burn_sample.csv")
```
